summary: A website to help organize school activities
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cheerful illustration of students collaborating around a calendar or bulletin board, warm color palette with oranges and teals (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Simple icon set for activity categories: sports ball, book, palette, and people icons in consistent style (category-icons.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that displays an overview of upcoming school activities with their dates, times, and locations
Implement functionality to create new school activities with fields for title, description, date, time, location, and category (e.g., sports, academic, arts, social)
Add ability to view detailed information for individual activities including full description, organizer details, and participant count
Implement activity registration functionality allowing users to sign up for activities and view their registered activities
Add filtering and search capabilities to find activities by category, date range, or keyword search
Create a calendar view that displays all activities in a monthly grid format with visual indicators for different activity types

Design a vibrant, education-focused visual theme with warm, energetic colors (oranges, greens, teals), playful typography, and a clean card-based layout that emphasizes clarity and accessibility for school environments

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a website to help organize school activities
